description: Fragment of a business letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: 11th or possibly early 12th century. Mentions logistics regarding ships; someone named [...] al-Fāsī; flax; someone named al-ʿArīf; intending to travel this year; Abū Isḥāq Avraham b. [...]; pepper; a merchant known as al-Wādiyashī (from Guadix, maybe the same as in T-S 20.4, T-S 20.122, T-S 18J3.13, ENA NS 18.24, and IOM D 55.14); and the sender's cousin (ibn ʿamm) [Abū] Zakariyyā Yehuda.
